mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HYMNS HM WHERE HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HYMNS HM WHERE HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND HM.NAME_JP = #{nameJp}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HYMNS HM WHERE HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND HM.NAME_KR = #{nameKr}

SELECT HM.ID, HM.NAME_JP, HM.NAME_KR, HM.LINK, HM.UPDATED_TIME, HM.UPDATED_USER, HM.LYRIC, HM.VISIBLE_FLG, HM.CLASSICAL FROM HYMNS HM WHERE HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND HM.NAME_KR LIKE #{keyword} ORDER BY HM.ID ASC

SELECT HM.ID, HM.NAME_JP, HM.NAME_KR, HM.LINK, HM.UPDATED_TIME, HM.UPDATED_USER, HM.LYRIC, HM.VISIBLE_FLG, HM.CLASSICAL FROM HYMNS HM WHERE HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND HM.CLASSICAL = 'false' AND HM.NAME_KR LIKE #{keyword} ORDER BY HM.ID ASC
SELECT HM.ID, HM.NAME_JP, HM.NAME_KR, HM.LINK, HM.UPDATED_TIME, HM.UPDATED_USER, HM.LYRIC, HM.VISIBLE_FLG, HM.CLASSICAL FROM HYMNS HM WHERE HM.ID = #{id} AND HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true'

SELECT HM.ID, HM.NAME_JP, HM.NAME_KR, HM.LINK, HM.UPDATED_TIME, HM.UPDATED_USER, HM.LYRIC, HM.VISIBLE_FLG, HM.CLASSICAL FROM HYMNS HM WHERE HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND HM.CLASSICAL = 'false' ORDER BY HM.ID ASC
SELECT HM.ID, HM.NAME_JP, HM.NAME_KR, HM.LINK, HM.UPDATED_TIME, HM.UPDATED_USER, HM.LYRIC, HM.VISIBLE_FLG, HM.CLASSICAL FROM HYMNS HM WHERE HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' ORDER BY HM.ID ASC
SELECT MAX(HM.UPDATED_TIME) FROM HYMNS HM WHERE HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HYMNS (ID, NAME_JP, NAME_KR, LINK, UPDATED_TIME, UPDATED_USER, LYRIC, VISIBLE_FLG, CLASSICAL) VALUES (#{id}, #{nameJp}, #{nameKr}, #{link}, #{updatedTime}, #{updatedUser}, #{lyric}, #{visibleFlg}, #{classical})
mapper.update: UPDATE HYMNS SET NAME_JP = #{nameJp}, NAME_KR = #{nameKr}, LINK = #{link}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime}, UPDATED_USER = #{updatedUser}, LYRIC = #{lyric}, VISIBLE_FLG = #{visibleFlg}, CLASSICAL = #{classical} WHERE ID = #{id}
